item.title: MOL profits slump as downstream woes outweigh oil price boost
item.description: Iran conflict and other disruptions affect oil and gas production but company optimistic of future output growth

item.title: Houston offshore gathering shrugs off Middle East volatility
item.description: Slow and steady wins the race for offshore operators attending OTC 2026 flagship event, many of whom are too focused on long-term plans to mind short-term price swings

item.title: Oil's new frontier? Sao Tome & Principe launches licensing round
item.description: African archipelago aims to build on industry interest in its deepwater plays

item.title: FPSO upgrade on cards at Eni asset in Ghana
item.description: Italian major signs deal to boost gas output from its Gye Nyame field

item.title: LNG sector seeing near-term ‘supply disruption’ not ‘demand destruction’, Excelerate says
item.description: Self-dubbed ‘boring’ infrastructure provider to swap around Pakistan FSRUs this year

item.title: Extension and clarity for FPSO on UK North Sea oilfield
item.description: FPSO on Catcher field gains several more years of work

item.title: FPSO wins extension for UK North Sea oilfield
item.description: FPSO on Catcher field gains several more years of work

item.title: DNO ‘sprinting’ to success in Norway with fast-track mindset
item.description: Company pushing joint venture partners to accelerate development of nine discoveries

item.title: Asian contracting heavyweight to chase $57.1 billion worth of energy projects
item.description: L&T is a leading contractor across key markets in India and the Middle East, with international projects contributing to more than 50% of its project portfolio

item.title: This week's leading oil and gas appointments
Aramco plans $373 million supercomputer to boost upstream operations
item.description: Saudi state giant teaming up with ‘solutions by stc’ for supercomputer project as part of ongoing digital transformation

item.title: Norwegian contractor wins Australian offshore role
item.description: DOF secures subsea commissioning support services contract for second quarter of 2027

item.title: Australian junior receives dual approvals for east coast gas field
item.description: Australian government opened a new wave of exploration nominations as it approves Amplitude Energy’s Annie field production licence

item.title: Eni decides on yard for novel Cyprus floater
item.description: Floating control unit lies at heart of Cronos project, which will feed gas to Egypt and Europe

item.title: How Venezuela could boost oil production by 500,000 barrels per day — under the right conditions
item.description: Former PDVSA executive sheds light on conditions in country’s broken oil system

item.title: $58 billion US shale merger reaches finish line
item.description: Devon Energy and Coterra Energy officially close merger that will create a top industry player

item.title: Cheniere shares fall as its higher projected earnings fail to impress
item.description: US LNG exporter sees uplift in production and margins for rest of year

item.title: New York official urges investors to block ExxonMobil’s Texas move
item.description: City comptroller Mark Levine, who manages pension fund holding ExxonMobil shares, says proposed move from New Jersey would weaken shareholder rights

item.title: Long journey back from global energy crisis, says Shell CEO
item.description: Wael Sawan says disruption caused by Iran war has already reduced global jet fuel demand by about 5%

item.title: ‘Easy wells are gone’: Industry backs 20k as driver of US Gulf growth
item.description: Operators need more affordable standardised next-gen subsea gear as high-pressure, high-temperature operations become the norm

item.title: SBM chief says Middle East conflict could 'strengthen' core market
item.description: Chief executive Oivind Tangen hints at Iran war upside as it upgrades revenue guidance and plans replacement installation vessel

item.title: Neo Next+ agrees $9.8 million takeover of Deltic
item.description: Deal follows a failed takeover bid announced last August

item.title: ExxonMobil seeks environmental licence for ninth Guyana project
item.description: Haimara discovery will anchor the next Stabroek block development

item.title: 'More exploration running room': ExxonMobil eyes gas potential in East Med, Greece and Algeria
item.description: ExxonMobil’s vice president of exploration and new ventures, John Ardill, tells OTC 2026 conference of the importance of ‘casting a broad net’

item.title: 'Exploration running room': ExxonMobil eyes gas potential in East Med, Greece and Algeria
item.description: ExxonMobil’s vice president of exploration and new ventures, John Ardill, tells OTC 2026 conference of the importance of ‘casting a broad net’

item.title: Significant M&A opportunity still exists in Norway, says Aker BP chief
item.description: Aker BP chief executive says there will be “a consolidation game” offshore Norway

item.title: EU weighs up suspending flaring penalties amid global energy disruptions
item.description: EU methane regulations due to take effect from 2027

item.title: Former Expand Energy CEO finds a new home in Oklahoma City
item.description: Nick Dell’osso, who abruptly left US shale producer in February, lands top job at Gulfport Energy

item.title: Chevron wins exploration deal in neglected Malta
item.description: Chevron move could further boost supermajor's Mediterranean exploration portfolio

item.title: Norwegian operator locks in more time with deepwater rig
item.description: Vaar Energi exercises option on one of its two contracted COSL rigs
